dailyNews.title: Unexploded missile extracted from house in western Iran
dailyNews.description: Rescue workers carefully extracted an unexploded missile from a house in Kuhdasht City, following US-Israeli airstrikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump Warns Of Severe Military Consequences If Iran Mines Strait Of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump warned Iran on Tuesday not to mine the Strait of Hormuz, after Tehran vowed that no Gulf oil would pass through the key waterway while the Middle East war is ongoing.

dailyNews.title: "Aggressor Must Be Punished": Iran Says Not Seeking Ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Iran is not seeking a ceasefire in the war against the United States and Israel, the powerful Iranian parliament speaker said on Tuesday, adding that the "aggressor" should be punished.

dailyNews.title: D.K. Shivakumar hosts dinner to mark six years as Karnataka Congress chief
dailyNews.description: Congratulating Shivakumar on completing six years at the helm of KPCC, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah said his deputy’s sagacity, ideological commitment and hard work is a model for young leaders

dailyNews.title: Could the US-Israel war with Iran fuel global inflation?
dailyNews.description: Oil prices are swinging as markets react to every twist in the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Is control of Iran’s natural resources a factor in US strategy?
dailyNews.description: Iran has vast oil as well as gas reserves and is a key supplier to China.

dailyNews.title: German Chancellor concerned US-Israel have no exit plan for Iran war
dailyNews.description: German Chancellor said there appears to be “clearly no joint plan” to bring the US-Israeli war on Iran to an end.

dailyNews.title: West Asia conflict: Jaishankar holds ‘detailed’ conversation with Iranian counterpart Araghchi
dailyNews.description: It was the third time that Mr. Jaishankar spoke to Mr. Araghchi since the U.S. and Israel launched the joint military strikes on Iran

dailyNews.title: About 140 US Military Personnel Injured In Iran War: Pentagon
dailyNews.description: About 140 US military personnel have been wounded in attacks since the start of the war against Iran, the Pentagon said on Tuesday.

dailyNews.description: Here are some news stories you might not have seen amid the United States-Israel war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: ‘America has no narrative for victory’

dailyNews.title: Erika Kirk replaces late husband Charlie Kirk on US Air Force Academy advisory board after Trump appointment
dailyNews.description: The board advises the US Department of Defense on key issues including academic standards, cadet morale and financial management.

dailyNews.title: More Iranian women's soccer personnel accept asylum in Australia amid threat of punishment in home country
dailyNews.description: Seven Iranian women's soccer players accepted asylum in Australia after Trump urges protection, fearing severe punishment if they are forced to return to Iran.

dailyNews.title: DOJ blasts 'partisan' DC Bar complaint against senior Trump official
dailyNews.description: The complaint against a top Trump official sparked fierce backlash from the Justice Department, adding fuel to the fire between the administration and the D.C. legal establishment.

dailyNews.title: Deputy AG Todd Blanche sheds light on new DOJ fraud division to address 'insane' problem
dailyNews.description: On the "Ruthless" podcast, Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche shed light on the new division at the DOJ targeting fraud as part of a broader crackdown by the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: US strike on key Iran oil hub would fit Trump's 'energy dominance doctrine,' expert says
dailyNews.description: Reports indicate President Donald Trump's administration is considering a direct attack on Iran's Kharg Island, which handles 90% of Iranian oil exports near the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: WATCH: Dem witness accuses Trump of ‘population purge,’ Kennedy fires back: ‘You trigger my gag reflex’
dailyNews.description: A Democrat-called witness at a Senate hearing drew a draw-dropping response from Sen. John Kennedy, R-La., after accusing the Trump administration of attempting a "population purge."

dailyNews.title: How Long Will the Iran War Last? Trump Offers Conflicting Answers.
dailyNews.description: Now 11 days into an expanding military campaign, President Trump and his officials have given conflicting indications on how long the United States intends the war to last.

dailyNews.title: Judge Is Skeptical of Penn’s Argument Against Trump Demand for List of Jews
dailyNews.description: A federal judge appeared receptive to the Trump administration’s demands for information about the University of Pennsylvania’s Jewish faculty and staff as the government pursues an antisemitism investigation.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon says about 140 U.S. service members wounded since Iran war began
dailyNews.description: President Trump says the Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let oil leave the Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Professor explains the risk insurance offered by Trump for oil tankers near Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump is offering political risk insurance to any tankers operating near Iran as the Iran war continues. Jatin Dua, director of the Oceans Lab at the University of Michigan, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump pushes Congress for college sports legislation
dailyNews.description: President Trump is preparing an executive order that he says will try to revert the economics of college sports back to what they were like before players could profit from their name, image, and likeness. Ross Dellenger, college football reporter for Yahoo Sports, joins to unpack what the president is trying to do.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon memo orders commanders to remove Anthropic from key systems
dailyNews.description: The Defense Department has notified senior leadership that they must remove Anthropic's products from their system within 180 days, the latest salvo in a feud between the AI company and the Trump administration.
